photo.caption: Saponaria × lempergii ‘Max Frei’ (hybrid soapwort), evergreen herbaceous perennial, 5 inches tall and spreading up to 2 feet wide, lance-shaped, hairy, dark green leaves and masses of pink flowers from summer into fall. Shear after bloom to improve looks and for best rebloom. Stems are brittle, so keep away from foot traffic. Hybrid between two Mediterranean species. Full sun, most soils. Sunset zones: 7-9, 14-24.
